original_cover.series: We Share Our Chemistry with the Stars
original_cover.palette_vibe: muted grey backdrop, vivid hyper-detailed iris

identity_v1.approach: literal Marc Quinn motif reinterpretation (eye as cosmos)
identity_v1.reason: too literal/decorative; doesn't reflect book's actual thesis

identity_v2.core_motif: monumental numerals '21' as weathered stone monoliths on horizon
identity_v2.palette: muted earth tones — slate grey, weathered stone, deep teal sky, amber sun, charcoal silhouette
identity_v2.typography: title + author rendered as text on cover in bold serif

illustrated_redesign.notes: v2 is the live candidate. Vision-analyze API is currently failing (401 auth error) so I can't auto-verify text legibility — user must open the file to confirm.
